description: The SlicingVolumeVisualizer component is used to visualize the slicer imported with new volumes imported into the game.

fields.AutoScale: Whether to auto scale the visual to fit the object it is slicing.
fields._renderer: The renderer component which this is slicing a mesh for.
fields._mesh: The mesh this visual is slicing.
fields._collider: The box collider that is used to interact with the slicer this is attached to.
fields._scale: The scale field of the slicer visual element.
fields.Slicers: A list of slicers that are slicing the object.
fields._slicePlanes: A list of slice planes that are slicing the object.
fields._highlights: a list of highlight components for slicing the object.
